reasons: The three 5k pointer p95 values exceed the historical 16 ms budget: 418.0, 399.3, and 418.9 ms.
The reload screenshot mismatch ratio is 0.000003271 rather than exact zero.
legacyIntegrationValidator.disposition: Do not relabel as green. Preserve this red performance/fidelity signal for EQ1 planning.

knownLimitations: The 5k pointer trace is over budget: worst p95 418.9 ms and over-budget ratio 1.0. EQ1 must replace the flat structural renderer with a real hierarchical React rendering contract and revisit performance.
A concurrent dev watcher in the same clone can invalidate browser execution contexts; verification commands were serialized and the exclusive integration run passed.
The reload screenshot differed by 19 of 5,808,552 pixels, a 0.000003271 mismatch ratio, while persistence revisions and console checks passed.
macOS packaging and signing remain outside EQ0.
